description: Designed arrest card. The background is a dark, slightly blurred black-and-white photograph of a man with short dark hair and a mustache wearing a checkered shirt, looking toward the camera. Large light-blue (cyan) bold serif capital text at top reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line: '1/27/2025 | Corpus Christi, Texas'. On the left, large bold white sans-serif text reads 'Honduran National'. Below is a white 'CRIMES:' heading with a bulleted entry: 'Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon'. The DHS seal and 'ICE' wordmark appear at the lower left. A diagonal dark-red banner ribbon across the lower-right corner reads 'CORPUS CHRISTI'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 | Corpus Christi, Texas; Honduran National; CRIMES: Aggravated assault w/deadly weapon; CORPUS CHRISTI
